# llms.txt — InfinityMade
# https://infinitymade.de/llms.txt
# A machine-readable overview of InfinityMade for AI crawlers and LLMs.

# Entity
InfinityMade is a German SaaS company based in Siegburg, NRW. It provides an all-in-one digital platform for small and medium-sized businesses (KMU) including website creation, WhatsApp AI receptionist, online booking system, and Google Business Profile optimization.
Wikidata: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q139764488

# Sectors served
- Hairdressers / Barbers (Friseur)
- Restaurants & Cafés (Gastronomie)
- Physiotherapy practices (Physiotherapie)
- Medical practices (Praxis)
- Fitness studios (Fitnessstudio)
- Nail salons (Nagelstudio)
- Tattoo studios (Tattoo)
- Spas & Wellness (Spa)
- Craftsmen / Handwerker
- Other small businesses

# Key products & services
1. Website creation — modern, responsive, fast-loading websites
2. WhatsApp AI Receptionist — 24/7 automated booking and customer communication via WhatsApp Business API
3. Online booking system — calendar widget with working hours, employee selection, service selection
4. Google Business Profile optimization — local SEO for Google Maps
5. Digital menu (QR code) — for restaurants
6. Social media management support

# Languages supported
German (de), English (en), Turkish (tr), Arabic (ar)

# Geographic focus
Primary: Siegburg, Köln, Bonn, Troisdorf, Hennef, Sankt Augustin, Lohmar (NRW, Germany)
Nationwide: Remote support available across Germany via cloud-based SaaS

# Pricing model
Subscription-based SaaS with tiered plans (Starter, Professional, Enterprise). One-time setup fees for web design.

# Contact
- Website: https://infinitymade.de
- Email: kontakt@infinitymade.de
- Phone: +49 152 28033834
- Address: Industriestraße 33, 53721 Siegburg, Germany

# Technical stack
- Frontend: Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS
- Hosting: Vercel
- Database & Auth: Supabase
- AI / Automation: n8n workflows on Hetzner VPS
- WhatsApp: Twilio WhatsApp Business API
- Payments: Stripe
- Calendar API: Custom Node.js/Express on Hetzner VPS
